name: Spicy Pineapple Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of electric mixer, beat eggs.
2. Add oil, sugar, and vanilla to the beaten eggs. Continue to beat until thick and foamy.
3. With a spoon, stir in zucchini and pineapple.
4. In another large bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the zucchini mixture until blended.
6. Add nuts and currants. Stir until blended.
7. Divide the batter evenly between two greased and floured 9-inch x 5-inch x 3-inch loaf pans.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 60 minutes, or until loaves are done.
9. Cool in pans for 10 minutes.
10. Turn out on wire cake racks to cool completely.
Yields: 2 loaves
